description: Residue BN254 Groth16 verifier: fast-G2 endomorphism subgroup check (ePrint 2022/348, g2check 4 ch) + vk_x MSM (8 ch) + Miller-fused witnessed-residue final-exp (ePrint 2024/640, fused-miller 23 ch + residue-tail 1 ch) -> verdict (mutable->immutable). The fused Miller folds c^-(6x+2) into the loop; the tail checks fF*w*cq2==cq*cq3 (c per-limb canonical, c*cInv==ONE, w in Fp6 + baked 27-coset, c transcript-bound). State threaded as transcript-anchored NFT commitments (T0=hash(A,B,C), T1, forward-chain pins, shared-tower relocation). Every step verified on the real standard BCH-2026 VM with its correct covenant tx.
